stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Complete line 3 for the sector WPT B to WPT C. What is the sector time from WPT B to WPT C and the accumulated time to DEST?

options.a: WPT B to WPT C: 25 minutes, and accumulated time: 52 minutes.
options.b: WPT B to WPT C: 25 minutes, and accumulated time: 48 minutes.
options.c: WPT B to WPT C: 23 minutes, and accumulated time: 46 minutes.
options.d: WPT B to WPT C: 23 minutes, and accumulated time: 50 minutes.
